name: ENTIA Entity Verification
description: 52M+ verified business entities across 34 countries. The deepest Spain business intelligence (BORME 40M+ acts, REPS healthcare, IBEX 35) plus VIES, GLEIF, Wikidata, Companies House, INSEE/Sirene, PRH, Brreg. Real-time entity lookup, trust scoring, compliance verification, KYB-ready for AI agents. Free tier: 100 req/day.

env.name: ENTIA_API_KEY
env.description: Optional API key (entia_live_...) for paid tiers. Free tier (100 req/day) needs no key. Get yours at https://entia.systems/mcp-setup

tools.name: entity_lookup
tools.description: Verify identity of any business by name, CIF/NIF, EU VAT or LEI. Cross-checks BORME, VIES, GLEIF, OFAC. Returns trust score.

tools.name: search_entities
tools.description: Search 5.5M+ entities across 34 countries by name, keyword, country, sector.

tools.name: borme_lookup
tools.description: Spanish mercantile acts (BORME, 40.3M acts since 2009). Directors, officers, new constitutions.

tools.name: verify_vat
tools.description: Real-time EU VAT validation via VIES (27 member states).

tools.name: zone_profile
tools.description: Spanish socioeconomic profile by postal code (INE, SEPE, AEAT). Income, unemployment, business density.

tools.name: get_competitors
tools.description: Competitors in same sector and city. 5.5M entities, 26 sectors.

tools.name: ai_ready_profile
tools.description: JSON-LD @graph + enrichment payload for an entity. KYB-ready for AI agents.

tools.name: get_showcase
tools.description: Curated enriched showcase entities for demo and discovery.
